nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 35. Southeast wind around 6 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain. Cloudy, with a high near 44. South wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain before 1am, then sleet likely and rain likely. Cloudy, with a low around 33. North wind 5 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of sleet and a chance of rain before 7am, then a chance of sleet and a chance of rain and snow between 7am and 2pm, then scattered snow showers. Cloudy, with a high near 35. North wind 9 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New snow accumulation of around one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Scattered Snow Showers then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: Scattered snow showers before 9pm, then a slight chance of snow between 9pm and 11pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. North wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 43. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 51. South wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Light Rain Likely then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Northwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 23. Northwest wind around 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 39. West wind around 8 mph.
